# isMemberRecord(_:)

**Instance Method**

Determines whether a given record is a member of this group record.

## Declaration

```swift
func isMemberRecord(_ inRecord: ODRecord!) throws
```

## Parameters

- **inRecord**: The record to test for membership.

## Discussion

If this record is not a group record, this method returns [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].



## Managing Group Records

- **addMemberRecord(_:)**: Adds a member record to this group record.
- **removeMemberRecord(_:)**: Removes a record as a member of this group record.
